log.context:
The watchdog now reports `OK port=up gateway=connected(2)`. The flapping has stopped.

---

**Root cause:** The `discord-watchdog.sh` cron job (runs every 3 minutes) was triggering spurious restarts due to a PID mismatch bug. The script used `pgrep -f "channels/discord" | head -1` to find the Discord bun process. Since `gigaclungus` runs an identically-named process with lower PIDs (started earlier), `head -1` always returned gigaclungus's SCREEN PID (`2167630`) instead of clungus's actual bun s...(truncated)
